## Concern

Describe the concern without sharing exploit details, secrets, or real sensitive data.

## Affected Area

Which component, document, or workflow is affected?

## Suggested Direction

What would make this safer?

## Private Reporting

For vulnerabilities that could be exploited, do not use this public template. Follow SECURITY.md instead.
